blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
